use_cases: Celebration moments like user signups, purchases, or achievement unlocks on SaaS platforms
E-commerce promotional banners with festive ambient effects during sales events
Event landing pages for conferences, launches, or product announcements
Hero sections requiring subtle animated backgrounds for visual interest
Milestone or success confirmation screens with celebratory visual feedback
ai_summary: A lightweight confetti particle animation background component featuring 3D perspective depth with white/off-white colored shapes including rectangles, circles, stars, and diamonds. The confetti continuously animates with physics-based movement including float phases, sway, and bob effects, creating a celebratory ambient visual suitable for hero sections, landing pages, or success confirmation screens across SaaS and e-commerce platforms.
